# hetzner-robot_server_market_order (Resource)

Orders a Hetzner **server market (auction)** server (`POST /order/server_market/transaction`).

~> Same billing/irreversibility caveats as `hetzner-robot_server_order`: `test = true` (default) validates only; `test = false` places a **real, billable** order; destroying the resource does **not** cancel the server. Auction listings are tied to a datacenter, so there is no `location`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_server_market_products" "auction" {}

resource "hetzner-robot_server_market_order" "deal" {
  product_id      = "1234" # an id from the auction list
  dist            = "Ubuntu 24.04 LTS base"
  authorized_keys = [data.hetzner-robot_ssh_key.node.fingerprint]
  primary_ipv4    = true # auction servers are IPv6-only by default
  test            = true
}
```

~> Auction servers are ordered **without a public IPv4** unless you request one.
Set `primary_ipv4 = true` (or add `"primary_ipv4"` to `addons`) to include it;
otherwise the server comes up IPv6-only and you'd have to order the IPv4
add-on separately via `hetzner-robot_server_addon_order`.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product_id` (String) Auction product ID (see the hetzner-robot_server_market_products data source)

### Optional

- `addons` (List of String) Product add-on IDs
- `authorized_keys` (List of String) SSH key fingerprints authorized on the server
- `dist` (String) Distribution/OS to preinstall
- `lang` (String) Installation language
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Root password (alternative to authorized_keys)
- `primary_ipv4` (Boolean) Convenience flag: when true, adds the "primary_ipv4" add-on so the auction server is ordered with a public IPv4 (auction servers are IPv6-only by default). Equivalent to including "primary_ipv4" in addons.
- `test` (Boolean) If true (default), validate the order only. Set to false to place a real, billable order.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `server_ip` (String) Assigned primary IP (once provisioned)
- `server_number` (Number) Assigned server number (once provisioned)
- `status` (String) Order status
- `transaction_id` (String) Order transaction ID
